ddls:
CREATE TABLE "management_packs" (
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management pack */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the management pack */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the management pack */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the management pack */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Release date of the management pack */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Last updated date of the management pack */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_pack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflows" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack the workflow belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workflow */,
  "workflow_type" TEXT /* Type of workflow (e.g., rule, monitor, task) */,
  "workflow_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of workflow (e.g., discovery, monitoring, alerting) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the workflow is enabled or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflows_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_types" (
  "workflow_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workflow type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "override_parameters" (
  "override_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each override parameter */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the override parameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the override parameter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the override parameter (e.g., bool, int) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the override parameter */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum allowed value of the override parameter */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed value of the override parameter */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* Allowed values for the override parameter (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("override_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_override_parameters_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "management_pack_versions" (
  "management_pack_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management pack version */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the management pack */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the management pack version */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Release date of the management pack version */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Last updated date of the management pack version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_pack_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_management_pack_versions_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack the incident belongs to */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the incident belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was created */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack the problem belongs to */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the problem belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the problem (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the problem (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the problem was created */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the problem was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack the change belongs to */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the change belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., update, addition, deletion) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the change was created */,
  "implemented_date" TEXT /* Date the change was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack the permission belongs to */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the permission belongs to */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the role has read access to the management pack/workflow */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the role has write access to the management pack/workflow */,
  "execute_access" INTEGER /* Whether the role has execute access to the management pack/workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the dashboard belongs to */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack the dashboard belongs to */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the dashboard belongs to */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., grid, tabular) */,
  "widgets" TEXT /* Widgets on the dashboard (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the KPI belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the KPI */,
  "value" TEXT /* Current value of the KPI */,
  "target_value" TEXT /* Target value of the KPI */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the KPI (e.g., percentage, number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack the integration belongs to */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the integration belongs to */,
  "external_system" TEXT /* External system the integration connects to */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the external system */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the external system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack affected by the activity */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow affected by the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "management_pack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the management pack the report belongs to */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_management_pack_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_pack_id") REFERENCES management_packs ("management_pack_id")
)
